item.title: Cuteness Classifier
item.description: A machine learning model trained to classify dog and cat images and rank their cuteness, comparing AI ratings against human rankings. Built in Python.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Cuteness Classifier is a two-stage machine learning pipeline that first classifies whether an image contains a dog or a cat, then assigns a cuteness score to the animal — comparing AI ratings against human perception.

sections.heading: Pipeline
steps: Binary classification: dog vs. cat using a trained CNN
Cuteness scoring: regression model outputs a 1–10 rating
Human comparison: AI scores benchmarked against human rankings

sections.heading: Results
sections.body: The model demonstrated strong alignment with human cuteness rankings, particularly for cats. The project illustrates end-to-end ML workflows from data preprocessing to evaluation and human-in-the-loop comparison.
